fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` specifies a replacement color for a single entry in a color font's palette. Use a span of these structs as <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides> to customize individual colors in the selected palette when cloning a typeface.

The `Color` property stores an `SKColor` value in ARGB format (`0xAARRGGBB`).

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { PaletteOverrides = overrides };
using var face = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies a replacement color for a single entry in a color font palette.

fields.value: The replacement color for the palette entry, stored as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> packed into a 32-bit unsigned integer in ARGB format (<c>0xAARRGGBB</c>).
fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement color for the palette entry.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current instance.

fields.value: The zero-based index of the palette entry to override.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the palette color entry to replace.
